calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Stan Bair, Clerk Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Sharon Kincaid, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff, Northridge Cooperative Homes, a California Corporation.
Attorney, Michael Sherwood Rossoff, representing the plaintiff.

Defendant, Roslyn Dentley, is present.
Defendant, Jerome Odhams, is present.
Attorney, Mitchell M. Blakely, representing the defendants through limited scope.

(Default entered on May 9, 2008 against defendant, Charles Dentley.)

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions. The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed.

This case settled, the trial date of June 2, 2008 is vacated.
